title_i18n.pt: Metal Gear Solid
Infiltração no Heliporto

items.title: Swim in through the dock and surface quietly

title_i18n.en: Swim in through the dock and surface quietly
title_i18n.pt: Nadar pela doca e emergir sem fazer barulho

items.description: Snake enters underwater; wait for the timing so no guard hears you climb out.

description_i18n.en: Snake enters underwater; wait for the timing so no guard hears you climb out.
description_i18n.pt: Snake entra por baixo d'água; espere o momento certo para sair sem que nenhum guarda ouça.

items.title: Slip past the surveillance camera

title_i18n.pt: Passar despercebido pela câmera de vigilância

items.description: Watch the rotating camera near the cargo door and move only when it faces away.

description_i18n.en: Watch the rotating camera near the cargo door and move only when it faces away.
description_i18n.pt: Observe a câmera giratória perto da porta de carga e ande só quando ela estiver virada para o outro lado.

items.title: Ride the cargo elevator up to the heliport

title_i18n.en: Ride the cargo elevator up to the heliport
title_i18n.pt: Subir pelo elevador de carga até o heliporto

items.description: Reach the cargo door at the top of the dock to trigger the elevator.

description_i18n.en: Reach the cargo door at the top of the dock to trigger the elevator.
description_i18n.pt: Chegue à porta de carga no topo da doca para acionar o elevador.

items.title: Save your game with Mei Ling

title_i18n.en: Save your game with Mei Ling
title_i18n.pt: Salvar o jogo com Mei Ling

items.description: Call codec frequency 140.96 to save whenever you need a checkpoint.

description_i18n.en: Call codec frequency 140.96 to save whenever you need a checkpoint.
description_i18n.pt: Ligue no codec na frequência 140.96 para salvar sempre que precisar de um ponto de retorno.

items.title: Call Colonel Campbell for the briefing

title_i18n.en: Call Colonel Campbell for the briefing
title_i18n.pt: Ligar para o Coronel Campbell para o briefing

items.description: Campbell answers on 140.85 and outlines the rescue and Metal Gear objectives.

description_i18n.en: Campbell answers on 140.85 and outlines the rescue and Metal Gear objectives.
description_i18n.pt: Campbell atende no 140.85 e explica os objetivos do resgate e do Metal Gear.

items.title: Sneak across the snowy heliport

title_i18n.pt: Atravessar o heliporto nevado sem ser visto

items.description: Stay crouched and hug the walls to avoid the patrolling guard's cone of view.

description_i18n.en: Stay crouched and hug the walls to avoid the patrolling guard's cone of view.
description_i18n.pt: Fique agachado e cole nas paredes para escapar do campo de visão do guarda que patrulha.

items.title: Hide from the searchlight

title_i18n.pt: Se esconder do holofote

items.description: Tuck under the parked cargo truck when the searchlight sweeps past.

description_i18n.en: Tuck under the parked cargo truck when the searchlight sweeps past.
description_i18n.pt: Fique embaixo do caminhão de carga estacionado quando o holofote passar.

items.title: Enter the Tank Hangar

title_i18n.pt: Entrar no Hangar dos Tanques

items.description: Use the door or air duct at the far end of the heliport to move indoors.

description_i18n.en: Use the door or air duct at the far end of the heliport to move indoors.
description_i18n.pt: Use a porta ou o duto de ventilação no fim do heliporto para entrar no prédio.

title_i18n.pt: Hangar dos Tanques e o Chefe da DARPA

items.title: Crawl through the vents into the hangar

title_i18n.en: Crawl through the vents into the hangar
title_i18n.pt: Rastejar pelos dutos até o hangar

items.description: The ducts drop you behind the guards, avoiding the ground-floor patrols.

description_i18n.en: The ducts drop you behind the guards, avoiding the ground-floor patrols.
description_i18n.pt: Os dutos te deixam atrás dos guardas, longe das patrulhas do térreo.

items.title: Spot Meryl disguised as a guard

title_i18n.en: Spot Meryl disguised as a guard
title_i18n.pt: Identificar Meryl disfarçada de guarda

items.description: One 'guard' behaves oddly on the lower floor — remember her, it's Meryl.

description_i18n.en: One 'guard' behaves oddly on the lower floor — remember her, it's Meryl.
description_i18n.pt: Um dos 'guardas' age de forma estranha no piso inferior — grave o rosto, é a Meryl.

items.title: Avoid the ceiling security cameras

title_i18n.pt: Evitar as câmeras de segurança do teto

items.description: Being seen raises the alert; wait for the cameras to pan away before crossing.

description_i18n.en: Being seen raises the alert; wait for the cameras to pan away before crossing.
description_i18n.pt: Ser visto ativa o alerta; espere as câmeras girarem para o outro lado antes de passar.

items.title: Note the gas-filled corridor

title_i18n.pt: Notar o corredor cheio de gás

items.description: You can't cross this passage yet — you'll need the gas mask found later.

description_i18n.en: You can't cross this passage yet — you'll need the gas mask found later.
description_i18n.pt: Você ainda não consegue cruzar essa passagem — vai precisar da máscara de gás obtida mais tarde.

items.title: Descend to the holding cells (B1)

title_i18n.pt: Descer até as celas (B1)

items.description: Take the elevator down to the cell block where the hostages are kept.

description_i18n.en: Take the elevator down to the cell block where the hostages are kept.
description_i18n.pt: Pegue o elevador para descer até o bloco de celas onde os reféns estão presos.

items.title: Meet the DARPA Chief, Donald Anderson

title_i18n.en: Meet the DARPA Chief, Donald Anderson
title_i18n.pt: Encontrar o Chefe da DARPA, Donald Anderson

items.description: He gives you the detonation-code intel, then collapses from a 'heart attack'.

description_i18n.en: He gives you the detonation-code intel, then collapses from a 'heart attack'.
description_i18n.pt: Ele passa a informação sobre o código de detonação e depois cai de um 'ataque cardíaco'.

items.title: Subdue the guard who turns out to be Meryl

title_i18n.en: Subdue the guard who turns out to be Meryl
title_i18n.pt: Render a guarda que se revela ser Meryl

items.description: Grab her before she draws; she'll give you her codec frequency (140.15).

description_i18n.en: Grab her before she draws; she'll give you her codec frequency (140.15).
description_i18n.pt: Segure-a antes que ela saque a arma; ela vai te dar a frequência de codec dela (140.15).

items.title: Pick up the SOCOM pistol

title_i18n.pt: Pegar a pistola SOCOM

items.description: Your first proper firearm — grab it before heading out to find ArmsTech's president.

description_i18n.en: Your first proper firearm — grab it before heading out to find ArmsTech's president.
description_i18n.pt: Sua primeira arma de fogo de verdade — pegue antes de ir atrás do presidente da ArmsTech.

title_i18n.pt: Revolver Ocelot e o Arsenal

items.title: Find President Kenneth Baker rigged with explosives

title_i18n.en: Find President Kenneth Baker rigged with explosives
title_i18n.pt: Encontrar o presidente Kenneth Baker preso com explosivos

items.description: He's tied to C4 in a room guarded by Ocelot — don't fire wildly near him.

description_i18n.en: He's tied to C4 in a room guarded by Ocelot — don't fire wildly near him.
description_i18n.pt: Ele está amarrado com C4 numa sala vigiada por Ocelot — não atire sem cuidado perto dele.

items.title: Boss: Revolver Ocelot — use the pillars for cover

title_i18n.en: Boss: Revolver Ocelot — use the pillars for cover
title_i18n.pt: Chefe: Revolver Ocelot — use os pilares como cobertura

items.description: Circle the pillars to break his line of fire and pop out to shoot.

description_i18n.en: Circle the pillars to break his line of fire and pop out to shoot.
description_i18n.pt: Gire em volta dos pilares para cortar a linha de tiro dele e apareça só para atirar.

items.title: Stay away from the walls

title_i18n.pt: Ficar longe das paredes

items.description: Ocelot's shots ricochet off walls and can hit you from the side.

description_i18n.en: Ocelot's shots ricochet off walls and can hit you from the side.
description_i18n.pt: Os tiros de Ocelot ricocheteiam nas paredes e podem te acertar de lado.

items.title: Shoot Ocelot while he reloads

title_i18n.pt: Atirar em Ocelot enquanto ele recarrega

items.description: His revolver holds 6 rounds; hit him during the long reload after the sixth shot.

description_i18n.en: His revolver holds 6 rounds; hit him during the long reload after the sixth shot.
description_i18n.pt: O revólver dele tem 6 tiros; acerte-o na recarga demorada depois do sexto disparo.

items.title: Watch the Cyborg Ninja end the fight

title_i18n.en: Watch the Cyborg Ninja end the fight
title_i18n.pt: Ver o Cyborg Ninja encerrar a luta

items.description: A mysterious ninja severs Ocelot's hand, cutting the battle short.

description_i18n.en: A mysterious ninja severs Ocelot's hand, cutting the battle short.
description_i18n.pt: Um ninja misterioso decepa a mão de Ocelot e interrompe a batalha.

items.title: Head to the Armory

title_i18n.pt: Ir até o Arsenal

items.description: Backtrack through the hangar area to reach the weapons storage rooms.

description_i18n.en: Backtrack through the hangar area to reach the weapons storage rooms.
description_i18n.pt: Volte pela área do hangar para chegar às salas de armazenamento de armas.

items.title: Grab the FA-MAS assault rifle

title_i18n.pt: Pegar o fuzil de assalto FA-MAS

items.description: Your main automatic weapon — far stronger than the SOCOM for firefights.

description_i18n.en: Your main automatic weapon — far stronger than the SOCOM for firefights.
description_i18n.pt: Sua arma automática principal — bem mais forte que a SOCOM em tiroteios.

items.title: Collect chaff, stun, and frag grenades

title_i18n.en: Collect chaff, stun, and frag grenades
title_i18n.pt: Coletar granadas chaff, de atordoamento e de fragmentação

items.description: Chaff disables cameras and electronics; stock all three types here.

description_i18n.en: Chaff disables cameras and electronics; stock all three types here.
description_i18n.pt: As chaff desativam câmeras e eletrônicos; estoque os três tipos aqui.

items.title: Pick up the body armor

title_i18n.pt: Pegar o colete à prova de balas

items.description: Cuts the damage you take — equip it before the tough boss fights.

description_i18n.en: Cuts the damage you take — equip it before the tough boss fights.
description_i18n.pt: Reduz o dano que você recebe — equipe antes das lutas difíceis contra chefes.

items.title: Note the doors that need C4

title_i18n.en: Note the doors that need C4
title_i18n.pt: Notar as portas que precisam de C4

items.description: Some armory walls are breakable later once you find the C4 explosive.

description_i18n.en: Some armory walls are breakable later once you find the C4 explosive.
description_i18n.pt: Algumas paredes do arsenal podem ser explodidas depois, quando você achar o C4.

title_i18n.pt: Desfiladeiro e o Tanque M1

items.title: Follow Meryl's directions toward the nuke building

title_i18n.en: Follow Meryl's directions toward the nuke building
title_i18n.pt: Seguir as orientações de Meryl rumo ao prédio nuclear

items.description: Call her on 140.15 if you lose your bearings between areas.

description_i18n.en: Call her on 140.15 if you lose your bearings between areas.
description_i18n.pt: Ligue para ela no 140.15 se ficar perdido entre as áreas.

items.title: Cross the open canyon path

title_i18n.pt: Cruzar o caminho aberto do desfiladeiro

items.description: The exposed valley is where an M1 tank ambushes you.

description_i18n.en: The exposed valley is where an M1 tank ambushes you.
description_i18n.pt: O vale exposto é onde um tanque M1 arma uma emboscada.

items.title: Boss: M1 Abrams tank

title_i18n.pt: Chefe: tanque M1 Abrams

items.description: Take cover behind the rocks to avoid the main cannon and machine gun.

description_i18n.en: Take cover behind the rocks to avoid the main cannon and machine gun.
description_i18n.pt: Use as pedras como cobertura para evitar o canhão principal e a metralhadora.

items.title: Blind the tank with chaff grenades

title_i18n.en: Blind the tank with chaff grenades
title_i18n.pt: Cegar o tanque com granadas chaff

items.description: Chaff scrambles its targeting so it can't lock onto you.

description_i18n.en: Chaff scrambles its targeting so it can't lock onto you.
description_i18n.pt: As chaff embaralham a mira dele e impedem que ele te fixe.

items.title: Grenade the open hatch

title_i18n.pt: Jogar granada na escotilha aberta

items.description: When the commander pops out to fire, lob a frag grenade right into the hatch.

description_i18n.en: When the commander pops out to fire, lob a frag grenade right into the hatch.
description_i18n.pt: Quando o comandante aparece para atirar, jogue uma granada de fragmentação direto na escotilha.

items.title: Keep moving between rocks

title_i18n.pt: Continuar se movendo entre as pedras

items.description: Don't stay put — reposition after each throw to dodge the return fire.

description_i18n.en: Don't stay put — reposition after each throw to dodge the return fire.
description_i18n.pt: Não fique parado — reposicione-se depois de cada arremesso para desviar do contra-ataque.

items.title: Destroy the tank and advance

title_i18n.pt: Destruir o tanque e avançar

items.description: A few good hatch hits finish it; then continue to the warhead storage.

description_i18n.en: A few good hatch hits finish it; then continue to the warhead storage.
description_i18n.pt: Alguns acertos certeiros na escotilha resolvem; depois siga para o depósito de ogivas.

title_i18n.pt: Depósito de Ogivas Nucleares

items.title: Enter the Nuclear Warhead Storage building

title_i18n.en: Enter the Nuclear Warhead Storage building
title_i18n.pt: Entrar no prédio de armazenamento de ogivas

items.description: This multi-level building holds key gear and the hiding Otacon.

description_i18n.en: This multi-level building holds key gear and the hiding Otacon.
description_i18n.pt: Este prédio de vários andares guarda equipamentos importantes e o Otacon escondido.

items.title: Find Otacon (Hal Emmerich) hiding

title_i18n.pt: Encontrar Otacon (Hal Emmerich) escondido

items.description: The terrified engineer gives you his codec frequency (141.12) and stealth help.

description_i18n.en: The terrified engineer gives you his codec frequency (141.12) and stealth help.
description_i18n.pt: O engenheiro apavorado te passa a frequência de codec dele (141.12) e ajuda com furtividade.

items.title: Pick up the night-vision goggles

title_i18n.pt: Pegar os óculos de visão noturna

items.description: Essential for the pitch-black rooms in the lower basement levels.

description_i18n.en: Essential for the pitch-black rooms in the lower basement levels.
description_i18n.pt: Essenciais para as salas totalmente escuras dos subsolos mais baixos.

items.title: Descend to B1 and B2

title_i18n.pt: Descer até o B1 e o B2

items.description: Watch for infrared beams and gun cameras on the stairwells.

description_i18n.en: Watch for infrared beams and gun cameras on the stairwells.
description_i18n.pt: Cuidado com os feixes infravermelhos e as câmeras armadas nas escadas.

items.title: Grab the C4 explosive

title_i18n.pt: Pegar o explosivo C4

items.description: Use it later to blow open cracked walls back in the armory and elsewhere.

description_i18n.en: Use it later to blow open cracked walls back in the armory and elsewhere.
description_i18n.pt: Use depois para explodir paredes rachadas no arsenal e em outros lugares.

items.title: Get the Nikita remote-guided missile launcher

title_i18n.en: Get the Nikita remote-guided missile launcher
title_i18n.pt: Pegar o lançador de mísseis guiados Nikita

items.description: You steer its missile with the D-pad in first person after firing.

description_i18n.en: You steer its missile with the D-pad in first person after firing.
description_i18n.pt: Você controla o míssil dele com o direcional em primeira pessoa depois de disparar.

items.title: Destroy the electric node with the Nikita

title_i18n.en: Destroy the electric node with the Nikita
title_i18n.pt: Destruir o nó elétrico com a Nikita

items.description: A live conduit blocks the path — guide a Nikita missile around the corner to hit it.

description_i18n.en: A live conduit blocks the path — guide a Nikita missile around the corner to hit it.
description_i18n.pt: Um duto energizado bloqueia o caminho — guie o míssil da Nikita pela curva para atingi-lo.

items.title: Save and stock up on rations

title_i18n.en: Save and stock up on rations
title_i18n.pt: Salvar e reabastecer rações

items.description: Rations auto-heal you in a pinch; grab any you find before the next boss.

description_i18n.en: Rations auto-heal you in a pinch; grab any you find before the next boss.
description_i18n.pt: As rações curam automaticamente num aperto; pegue todas que achar antes do próximo chefe.

title_i18n.pt: Cyborg Ninja e Psycho Mantis

items.title: Return through the lab area

title_i18n.pt: Voltar pela área do laboratório

items.description: Backtrack toward the medical/lab rooms where the Ninja is waiting.

description_i18n.en: Backtrack toward the medical/lab rooms where the Ninja is waiting.
description_i18n.pt: Volte na direção das salas médicas/laboratório onde o Ninja está à espera.

items.title: Boss: Cyborg Ninja (Gray Fox)

title_i18n.pt: Chefe: Cyborg Ninja (Gray Fox)

items.description: He shrugs off bullets at first — open with hand-to-hand punches and kicks.

description_i18n.en: He shrugs off bullets at first — open with hand-to-hand punches and kicks.
description_i18n.pt: No começo ele ignora as balas — comece no corpo a corpo com socos e chutes.

items.title: Switch to the FA-MAS when his armor sparks

title_i18n.en: Switch to the FA-MAS when his armor sparks
title_i18n.pt: Trocar para o FA-MAS quando a armadura dele soltar faíscas

items.description: Once he's damaged and glowing, gunfire starts to connect.

description_i18n.en: Once he's damaged and glowing, gunfire starts to connect.
description_i18n.pt: Depois de danificado e brilhando, os tiros começam a acertar.

items.title: Wear him down until he yields

title_i18n.en: Wear him down until he yields
title_i18n.pt: Desgastá-lo até ele ceder

items.description: He says he only wants a worthy fight; keep pressing to end the battle.

description_i18n.en: He says he only wants a worthy fight; keep pressing to end the battle.
description_i18n.pt: Ele diz que só quer uma luta à altura; continue pressionando para encerrar a batalha.

items.title: Reach the Commander's Room

title_i18n.pt: Chegar à Sala do Comandante

items.description: Meryl is here but acting strangely — Psycho Mantis is controlling her.

description_i18n.en: Meryl is here but acting strangely — Psycho Mantis is controlling her.
description_i18n.pt: Meryl está aqui, mas agindo de forma estranha — Psycho Mantis a está controlando.

items.title: Boss: Psycho Mantis reads your mind

title_i18n.en: Boss: Psycho Mantis reads your mind
title_i18n.pt: Chefe: Psycho Mantis lê sua mente

items.description: He predicts every move and even comments on your memory card saves.

description_i18n.en: He predicts every move and even comments on your memory card saves.
description_i18n.pt: Ele prevê cada movimento e até comenta os saves do seu cartão de memória.

items.title: Move the controller to port 2

title_i18n.pt: Mudar o controle para a porta 2

items.description: Unplug the pad and plug it into port 2 so Mantis can't read your inputs.

description_i18n.en: Unplug the pad and plug it into port 2 so Mantis can't read your inputs.
description_i18n.pt: Desconecte o controle e ligue na porta 2 para que Mantis não consiga ler seus comandos.

items.title: Don't let mind-controlled Meryl shoot herself

title_i18n.en: Don't let mind-controlled Meryl shoot herself
title_i18n.pt: Não deixar a Meryl controlada atirar em si mesma

items.description: Punch her out to break the spell if Mantis makes her point the gun at her head.

description_i18n.en: Punch her out to break the spell if Mantis makes her point the gun at her head.
description_i18n.pt: Nocauteie-a para quebrar o controle se Mantis fizer ela apontar a arma para a própria cabeça.

items.title: Shoot Mantis when he's visible and defeat him

title_i18n.en: Shoot Mantis when he's visible and defeat him
title_i18n.pt: Atirar em Mantis quando ele aparecer e derrotá-lo

items.description: He turns invisible; fire the instant he materializes to attack.

description_i18n.en: He turns invisible; fire the instant he materializes to attack.
description_i18n.pt: Ele fica invisível; atire no instante em que ele se materializa para atacar.

title_i18n.pt: Cavernas e Sniper Wolf, Primeiro Duelo

items.title: Follow Meryl into the caves

title_i18n.pt: Seguir Meryl pelas cavernas

items.description: She leads the way; stay close and mind the terrain.

description_i18n.en: She leads the way; stay close and mind the terrain.
description_i18n.pt: Ela guia o caminho; fique perto e preste atenção no terreno.

items.title: Fend off the guard dogs

title_i18n.pt: Enfrentar os cães de guarda

items.description: Wolves roam the cave; use the SOCOM or run past them to the exit.

description_i18n.en: Wolves roam the cave; use the SOCOM or run past them to the exit.
description_i18n.pt: Lobos rondam a caverna; use a SOCOM ou corra por eles até a saída.

items.title: Watch Sniper Wolf shoot Meryl

title_i18n.pt: Ver Sniper Wolf atirar em Meryl

items.description: As Meryl steps into the open, a hidden sniper drops her — you're outgunned.

description_i18n.en: As Meryl steps into the open, a hidden sniper drops her — you're outgunned.
description_i18n.pt: Quando Meryl entra na área aberta, uma atiradora escondida a derruba — você está em desvantagem.

items.title: Retreat — you need a sniper rifle

title_i18n.en: Retreat — you need a sniper rifle
title_i18n.pt: Recuar — você precisa de um rifle de precisão

items.description: Your current weapons can't reach her; back off and go find long-range gear.

description_i18n.en: Your current weapons can't reach her; back off and go find long-range gear.
description_i18n.pt: Suas armas atuais não a alcançam; recue e vá buscar equipamento de longo alcance.

items.title: Backtrack to the Armory for the PSG-1

title_i18n.en: Backtrack to the Armory for the PSG-1
title_i18n.pt: Voltar ao Arsenal para pegar o PSG-1

items.description: The PSG-1 sniper rifle is stored back in the armory — a long detour, but required.

description_i18n.en: The PSG-1 sniper rifle is stored back in the armory — a long detour, but required.
description_i18n.pt: O rifle de precisão PSG-1 fica guardado no arsenal — um desvio longo, mas obrigatório.

items.title: Return and equip the PSG-1

title_i18n.pt: Voltar e equipar o PSG-1

items.description: Head back to the sniping spot overlooking Wolf's position.

description_i18n.en: Head back to the sniping spot overlooking Wolf's position.
description_i18n.pt: Volte ao ponto de tiro com vista para a posição da Wolf.

items.title: Use diazepam to steady your aim

title_i18n.en: Use diazepam to steady your aim
title_i18n.pt: Usar diazepam para firmar a mira

items.description: The scope sways badly; diazepam calms Snake's hands so the crosshair holds.

description_i18n.en: The scope sways badly; diazepam calms Snake's hands so the crosshair holds.
description_i18n.pt: A luneta balança muito; o diazepam acalma as mãos de Snake e a mira fica parada.

items.title: Snipe and defeat Sniper Wolf

title_i18n.pt: Atirar de longe e derrotar Sniper Wolf

items.description: Trade shots across the field; land enough hits to win the first duel.

description_i18n.en: Trade shots across the field; land enough hits to win the first duel.
description_i18n.pt: Troque tiros pela clareira; acerte o suficiente para vencer o primeiro duelo.

title_i18n.pt: Tortura, Torres e o Hind D

items.title: Survive Ocelot's torture

title_i18n.pt: Sobreviver à tortura de Ocelot

items.description: Rapidly tap the button to keep Snake's life bar from emptying.

description_i18n.en: Rapidly tap the button to keep Snake's life bar from emptying.
description_i18n.pt: Aperte o botão rapidamente para não deixar a barra de vida de Snake zerar.

items.title: Resist — do not submit

title_i18n.pt: Resistir — não se render

items.description: Choosing to resist keeps Meryl alive and unlocks the infinite-ammo bandana ending.

description_i18n.en: Choosing to resist keeps Meryl alive and unlocks the infinite-ammo bandana ending.
description_i18n.pt: Escolher resistir mantém Meryl viva e libera o final com a bandana de munição infinita.

items.title: Fake your death with the ketchup

title_i18n.en: Fake your death with the ketchup
title_i18n.pt: Fingir a morte com o ketchup

items.description: In the cell, use the ketchup so the guard opens the door thinking you're dead.

description_i18n.en: In the cell, use the ketchup so the guard opens the door thinking you're dead.
description_i18n.pt: Na cela, use o ketchup para o guarda abrir a porta achando que você está morto.

items.title: Knock out the guard and escape the cell

title_i18n.en: Knock out the guard and escape the cell
title_i18n.pt: Nocautear o guarda e escapar da cela

items.description: Slip out when he steps in, then recover your confiscated gear nearby.

description_i18n.en: Slip out when he steps in, then recover your confiscated gear nearby.
description_i18n.pt: Saia quando ele entrar e depois recupere seu equipamento confiscado ali perto.

items.title: Climb Communication Tower A

title_i18n.pt: Subir a Torre de Comunicação A

items.description: Fight your way up the long stairwell with the FA-MAS as guards pour in.

description_i18n.en: Fight your way up the long stairwell with the FA-MAS as guards pour in.
description_i18n.pt: Suba a longa escada abrindo caminho com o FA-MAS enquanto os guardas chegam.

items.title: Rappel down the wall of Tower B

title_i18n.en: Rappel down the wall of Tower B
title_i18n.pt: Descer de rapel pela parede da Torre B

items.description: Press against the wall and descend, dodging the gunships as you drop.

description_i18n.en: Press against the wall and descend, dodging the gunships as you drop.
description_i18n.pt: Encoste na parede e desça, desviando dos helicópteros durante a descida.

items.title: Grab the Stinger missile launcher

title_i18n.pt: Pegar o lançador de mísseis Stinger

items.description: The heat-seeking Stinger is essential for the helicopter and Metal Gear REX.

description_i18n.en: The heat-seeking Stinger is essential for the helicopter and Metal Gear REX.
description_i18n.pt: O Stinger, que busca calor, é essencial para o helicóptero e o Metal Gear REX.

items.title: Boss: Hind D helicopter (Liquid)

title_i18n.pt: Chefe: helicóptero Hind D (Liquid)

items.description: Lock on with the Stinger and hold until the reticle turns red before firing.

description_i18n.en: Lock on with the Stinger and hold until the reticle turns red before firing.
description_i18n.pt: Trave a mira com o Stinger e segure até o retículo ficar vermelho antes de disparar.

items.title: Dodge the Hind's rockets and gunfire

title_i18n.en: Dodge the Hind's rockets and gunfire
title_i18n.pt: Desviar dos foguetes e tiros do Hind

items.description: Keep moving around the roof between shots and use rations to survive hits.

description_i18n.en: Keep moving around the roof between shots and use rations to survive hits.
description_i18n.pt: Continue se movendo pelo telhado entre os disparos e use rações para aguentar os acertos.

title_i18n.pt: Campo de Neve, Alto-Forno e Vulcan Raven

items.title: Cross the open snowfield

title_i18n.pt: Atravessar o campo de neve aberto

items.description: Sniper Wolf is waiting for a rematch in this exposed clearing.

description_i18n.en: Sniper Wolf is waiting for a rematch in this exposed clearing.
description_i18n.pt: Sniper Wolf espera pela revanche nesta clareira exposta.

items.title: Second duel: defeat Sniper Wolf for good

title_i18n.en: Second duel: defeat Sniper Wolf for good
title_i18n.pt: Segundo duelo: derrotar Sniper Wolf de vez

items.description: Use the PSG-1 with diazepam again; this fight ends her story.

description_i18n.en: Use the PSG-1 with diazepam again; this fight ends her story.
description_i18n.pt: Use o PSG-1 com diazepam de novo; esta luta encerra a história dela.

items.title: Keep rations ready during the fight

title_i18n.en: Keep rations ready during the fight
title_i18n.pt: Manter rações prontas durante a luta

items.description: Her shots hurt at range; heal between exchanges to outlast her.

description_i18n.en: Her shots hurt at range; heal between exchanges to outlast her.
description_i18n.pt: Os tiros dela machucam à distância; cure-se entre as trocas para durar mais que ela.

items.title: Move through the Blast Furnace

title_i18n.pt: Atravessar o Alto-Forno

items.description: Time your crossing over the moving conveyor and avoid the flames.

description_i18n.en: Time your crossing over the moving conveyor and avoid the flames.
description_i18n.pt: Cronometre a travessia sobre a esteira em movimento e evite as chamas.

items.title: Cross the cargo elevator

title_i18n.pt: Cruzar o elevador de carga

items.description: Fight off the guards who ambush you on the platform as it moves.

description_i18n.en: Fight off the guards who ambush you on the platform as it moves.
description_i18n.pt: Enfrente os guardas que te emboscam na plataforma enquanto ela se move.

items.title: Reach the Warehouse

title_i18n.pt: Chegar ao Armazém

items.description: This large storage floor is Vulcan Raven's battleground.

description_i18n.en: This large storage floor is Vulcan Raven's battleground.
description_i18n.pt: Este grande piso de estocagem é o campo de batalha de Vulcan Raven.

items.title: Boss: Vulcan Raven with the gatling gun

title_i18n.en: Boss: Vulcan Raven with the gatling gun
title_i18n.pt: Chefe: Vulcan Raven com a metralhadora gatling

items.description: Stay out of his line of sight and never stand still in the open.

description_i18n.en: Stay out of his line of sight and never stand still in the open.
description_i18n.pt: Fique fora da linha de visão dele e nunca pare no aberto.

items.title: Plant Claymore mines in his path

title_i18n.en: Plant Claymore mines in his path
title_i18n.pt: Plantar minas Claymore no caminho dele

items.description: Lay Claymores around corners so he walks into them while chasing you.

description_i18n.en: Lay Claymores around corners so he walks into them while chasing you.
description_i18n.pt: Coloque Claymores nas curvas para ele pisar nelas enquanto te persegue.

items.title: Finish him with Nikita or grenades

title_i18n.en: Finish him with Nikita or grenades
title_i18n.pt: Acabar com ele usando Nikita ou granadas

items.description: Guide Nikita missiles around the boxes or lob grenades from behind cover.

description_i18n.en: Guide Nikita missiles around the boxes or lob grenades from behind cover.
description_i18n.pt: Guie os mísseis da Nikita pelas caixas ou jogue granadas de trás da cobertura.

title_i18n.pt: Chaves PAL e o Hangar do REX

items.title: Obtain the PAL key

title_i18n.pt: Obter a chave PAL

items.description: You must insert it into three keyholes to interact with Metal Gear's controls.

description_i18n.en: You must insert it into three keyholes to interact with Metal Gear's controls.
description_i18n.pt: Você precisa inseri-la em três fechaduras para mexer nos controles do Metal Gear.

items.title: Learn the temperature trick

title_i18n.pt: Descobrir o truque da temperatura

items.description: The key's shape and ID change with heat and cold — each slot needs a different state.

description_i18n.en: The key's shape and ID change with heat and cold — each slot needs a different state.
description_i18n.pt: O formato e o ID da chave mudam com calor e frio — cada fechadura precisa de um estado diferente.

items.title: Warm the key near the steam

title_i18n.en: Warm the key near the steam
title_i18n.pt: Aquecer a chave perto do vapor

items.description: Hold it by the hot steam/heater until it changes, then use it in the matching slot.

description_i18n.en: Hold it by the hot steam/heater until it changes, then use it in the matching slot.
description_i18n.pt: Segure-a perto do vapor quente/aquecedor até ela mudar e use na fechadura correspondente.

items.title: Cool the key in the freezer room

title_i18n.en: Cool the key in the freezer room
title_i18n.pt: Resfriar a chave na sala congelante

items.description: Take it to the cold room until it changes again for the third insertion.

description_i18n.en: Take it to the cold room until it changes again for the third insertion.
description_i18n.pt: Leve-a até a sala fria até ela mudar de novo para a terceira inserção.

items.title: Insert the key into all three keyholes

title_i18n.en: Insert the key into all three keyholes
title_i18n.pt: Inserir a chave nas três fechaduras

items.description: Room temp, hot, and cold each match one slot — complete all three.

description_i18n.en: Room temp, hot, and cold each match one slot — complete all three.
description_i18n.pt: Temperatura ambiente, quente e fria — cada uma corresponde a uma fechadura; complete as três.

items.title: Descend to the underground REX hangar

title_i18n.en: Descend to the underground REX hangar
title_i18n.pt: Descer até o hangar subterrâneo do REX

items.description: The elevator drops into the massive chamber where Metal Gear REX is stored.

description_i18n.en: The elevator drops into the massive chamber where Metal Gear REX is stored.
description_i18n.pt: O elevador desce na câmara gigantesca onde o Metal Gear REX está guardado.

items.title: Meet Otacon at Metal Gear

title_i18n.pt: Reencontrar Otacon junto ao Metal Gear

items.description: He explains REX's weak points before the fight begins.

description_i18n.en: He explains REX's weak points before the fight begins.
description_i18n.pt: Ele explica os pontos fracos do REX antes de a luta começar.

items.title: Learn that Master Miller is really Liquid

title_i18n.en: Learn that Master Miller is really Liquid
title_i18n.pt: Descobrir que Master Miller é na verdade Liquid

items.description: Naomi warns you over codec that the mentor's calls were Liquid all along.

description_i18n.en: Naomi warns you over codec that the mentor's calls were Liquid all along.
description_i18n.pt: Naomi te avisa pelo codec que as ligações do mentor eram do Liquid o tempo todo.

title_i18n.pt: Metal Gear REX

items.title: Enter the hangar as Liquid boards REX

title_i18n.en: Enter the hangar as Liquid boards REX
title_i18n.pt: Entrar no hangar enquanto Liquid embarca no REX

items.description: Liquid pilots the walking tank; the two-phase boss fight begins.

description_i18n.en: Liquid pilots the walking tank; the two-phase boss fight begins.
description_i18n.pt: Liquid pilota o tanque bípede; começa a luta de chefe em duas fases.

items.title: Gray Fox returns to help

title_i18n.pt: Gray Fox volta para ajudar

items.description: The Cyborg Ninja reappears and buys you openings against REX.

description_i18n.en: The Cyborg Ninja reappears and buys you openings against REX.
description_i18n.pt: O Cyborg Ninja reaparece e abre brechas para você atacar o REX.

items.title: Phase 1: destroy the radome

title_i18n.pt: Fase 1: destruir a antena radar (radome)

items.description: Blow off REX's radar dome with Stinger missiles so it loses its targeting.

description_i18n.en: Blow off REX's radar dome with Stinger missiles so it loses its targeting.
description_i18n.pt: Exploda a cúpula de radar do REX com mísseis Stinger para ele perder a mira.

items.title: Follow Otacon's guidance to the weak spot

title_i18n.en: Follow Otacon's guidance to the weak spot
title_i18n.pt: Seguir a orientação de Otacon até o ponto fraco

items.description: Call him if you can't tell where to aim during each phase.

description_i18n.en: Call him if you can't tell where to aim during each phase.
description_i18n.pt: Ligue para ele se não souber onde mirar em cada fase.

items.title: Watch Gray Fox get crushed, exposing the cockpit

title_i18n.en: Watch Gray Fox get crushed, exposing the cockpit
title_i18n.pt: Ver Gray Fox ser esmagado, expondo a cabine

items.description: His sacrifice forces the cockpit open for phase two.

description_i18n.en: His sacrifice forces the cockpit open for phase two.
description_i18n.pt: O sacrifício dele força a cabine a se abrir para a segunda fase.

items.title: Phase 2: hit the exposed cockpit

title_i18n.pt: Fase 2: acertar a cabine exposta

items.description: Fire Stinger missiles straight at Liquid in the open cockpit.

description_i18n.en: Fire Stinger missiles straight at Liquid in the open cockpit.
description_i18n.pt: Dispare mísseis Stinger direto no Liquid na cabine aberta.

items.title: Dodge the laser, missiles, and stomps

title_i18n.en: Dodge the laser, missiles, and stomps
title_i18n.pt: Desviar do laser, dos mísseis e das pisadas

items.description: Keep circling REX and reload behind cover between missile volleys.

description_i18n.en: Keep circling REX and reload behind cover between missile volleys.
description_i18n.pt: Continue girando ao redor do REX e recarregue atrás de cobertura entre as rajadas de mísseis.

items.title: Destroy Metal Gear REX

title_i18n.pt: Destruir o Metal Gear REX

items.description: Enough cockpit hits finally bring the machine down.

description_i18n.en: Enough cockpit hits finally bring the machine down.
description_i18n.pt: Acertos suficientes na cabine finalmente derrubam a máquina.

title_i18n.pt: Fuga: Liquid e o Jipe

items.title: Climb onto the REX wreck

title_i18n.pt: Subir nos destroços do REX

items.description: Liquid survives the crash and challenges you on top of the ruined machine.

description_i18n.en: Liquid survives the crash and challenges you on top of the ruined machine.
description_i18n.pt: Liquid sobrevive à queda e te desafia em cima da máquina destruída.

items.title: Boss: Liquid Snake fistfight

title_i18n.pt: Chefe: luta de socos contra Liquid Snake

items.description: Hand-to-hand only — punch combos and grapple throws, no weapons.

description_i18n.en: Hand-to-hand only — punch combos and grapple throws, no weapons.
description_i18n.pt: Só corpo a corpo — combos de soco e projeções, sem armas.

items.title: Beat the time limit

title_i18n.pt: Vencer dentro do tempo

items.description: You have about three minutes before the base blows; don't stall.

description_i18n.en: You have about three minutes before the base blows; don't stall.
description_i18n.pt: Você tem cerca de três minutos antes de a base explodir; não enrole.

items.title: Knock Liquid off the platform

title_i18n.pt: Jogar Liquid para fora da plataforma

items.description: Push him toward the edge and avoid being thrown off yourself.

description_i18n.en: Push him toward the edge and avoid being thrown off yourself.
description_i18n.pt: Empurre-o para a beirada e evite ser arremessado você mesmo.

items.title: Race through the collapsing base

title_i18n.pt: Correr pela base em colapso

items.description: Reunite with your ally and reach the waiting jeep before time runs out.

description_i18n.en: Reunite with your ally and reach the waiting jeep before time runs out.
description_i18n.pt: Reencontre seu aliado e chegue ao jipe à espera antes que o tempo acabe.

items.title: Drive the jeep escape sequence

title_i18n.pt: Dirigir a sequência de fuga no jipe

items.description: Steer through the corridors while enemies chase you down the tunnel.

description_i18n.en: Steer through the corridors while enemies chase you down the tunnel.
description_i18n.pt: Dirija pelos corredores enquanto os inimigos te perseguem pelo túnel.

items.title: Shoot the pursuing guards and vehicles

title_i18n.en: Shoot the pursuing guards and vehicles
title_i18n.pt: Atirar nos guardas e veículos que perseguem

items.description: Your passenger drives while you gun down the chasers from the back.

description_i18n.en: Your passenger drives while you gun down the chasers from the back.
description_i18n.pt: Seu passageiro dirige enquanto você derruba os perseguidores por trás.

items.title: Reach the exit and watch the ending

title_i18n.en: Reach the exit and watch the ending
title_i18n.pt: Chegar à saída e ver o final

items.description: Your passenger is Meryl if you resisted torture, or Otacon if you submitted.

description_i18n.en: Your passenger is Meryl if you resisted torture, or Otacon if you submitted.
description_i18n.pt: Seu passageiro é a Meryl se você resistiu à tortura, ou o Otacon se você se rendeu.

items.title: Optional: unlock your reward for replaying

title_i18n.en: Optional: unlock your reward for replaying
title_i18n.pt: Opcional: liberar sua recompensa para rejogar

items.description: Finishing nets the infinite-ammo bandana (Meryl) or stealth camo (Otacon) for a new game.

description_i18n.en: Finishing nets the infinite-ammo bandana (Meryl) or stealth camo (Otacon) for a new game.
description_i18n.pt: Terminar concede a bandana de munição infinita (Meryl) ou a camuflagem furtiva (Otacon) para um novo jogo.

trophies.title: Shadow Moses Survivor

title_i18n.pt: Sobrevivente de Shadow Moses

trophies.description: Complete the game on any difficulty.

description_i18n.en: Complete the game on any difficulty.
description_i18n.pt: Termine o jogo em qualquer dificuldade.

trophies.title: Perfect Stealth

title_i18n.pt: Furtividade Perfeita

trophies.description: Clear an entire area without triggering a single alert.

description_i18n.en: Clear an entire area without triggering a single alert.
description_i18n.pt: Atravesse uma área inteira sem disparar nenhum alerta.

trophies.title: Boss Slayer

title_i18n.pt: Caçador de Chefes

trophies.description: Defeat every boss in the game.

description_i18n.en: Defeat every boss in the game.
description_i18n.pt: Derrote todos os chefes do jogo.

trophies.title: Metal Gear Down

title_i18n.pt: Metal Gear Abatido

trophies.description: Destroy REX and complete the game with the platinum-tier ending.

description_i18n.en: Destroy REX and complete the game with the platinum-tier ending.
description_i18n.pt: Destrua o REX e complete o jogo com o final de nível platina.
